# kCFProxyPortNumberKey | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ CFNetwork ](/documentation/cfnetwork)

-  kCFProxyPortNumberKey 

Global Variable# kCFProxyPortNumberKey

iOS 2.0+iPadOS 2.0+Mac Catalyst 13.1+macOS 10.5+tvOS 9.0+visionOS 1.0+

```
let kCFProxyPortNumberKey: CFString
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/cfnetwork/kcfproxyportnumberkey#Discussion)

A `CFNumber` value specifying the port that should be used to contact the proxy.
